steps.title: Use the increase factor
steps.content:
A $27\%$ increase means the new amount is $127\%$ of the original amount:
$$127\%=1.27$$

steps.title: Find the projection
steps.content:
Multiply the original number of jobs by the increase factor:
$$122{,}000\cdot 1.27=154{,}940$$

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The closest listed value to $154{,}940$ is $154{,}900$. The answer is D.
